docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ON AUGUST 25, 2016 AT 1:30 PM. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ABRHAM AYALEW & DEFENDANT ATSEDE AYALEW. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT TENDERED TWO CASHIER'S CHECKS ($4,000.00 EACH) TOTALING $8,000.00 TO PLAINTIFF IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS FOR $8,000.00. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0 .00 - SERVED JUL-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALEW, ATSEDE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY AYALEW, ABRHAM AS TO DEFENDANT AYALEW, ATSEDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AYALEW, ABRHAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
